scripts.validate: tsc -b && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --noEmit && vitest run && node scripts/check-package-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-package-exports.mjs && node scripts/check-api-snapshot.mjs && tsc -b
scripts.release:check: tsc -b && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --noEmit && vitest run && node scripts/check-package-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-package-exports.mjs && node scripts/check-api-snapshot.mjs && tsc -b && node scripts/check-tarball-smoke.mjs

mGrid.offeringPolicy: Single open-source offering with no Community/Pro separation during the first project year
